hero.subtitle: Specialists in waterproofing, engineering, construction and project supervision. We operate throughout Mexico with guaranteed quality.

about.title: A young company with elite experience
about.description: We are a company focused on Waterproofing, Engineering, Construction and Supervision, balancing quality, scope, time and cost requirements, adapting specifications and plans to our clients' needs and interests.
about.vision_text: To be recognized as the best Waterproofing, Engineering, Construction and Supervision company in the projects where we participate, based on our human factor, quality criteria, safety and environmental respect.

services.title: Comprehensive construction solutions
services.subtitle: We offer a complete range of services for residential, commercial and institutional projects throughout Mexico.

impermeabilizacion.name: Waterproofing
impermeabilizacion.desc: Total protection for rooftops, slabs and facades with next-generation materials. Our main specialty.

construccion.name: General Construction
construccion.desc: Construction of residential, commercial and institutional buildings with high quality standards.

albanileria.name: General Masonry
albanileria.desc: Masonry work, plastering, framing and finishes with specialized labor.

supervision.name: Project Supervision & Management
supervision.desc: Technical control and monitoring of projects to ensure quality, timeline and budget.

instalaciones_hidraulicas.name: Hydraulic & Sanitary Systems
instalaciones_hidraulicas.desc: Complete systems for potable water, drainage, fire suppression, LP gas and compressed air.

instalaciones_electricas.name: Electrical Installations
instalaciones_electricas.desc: Electrical maintenance, panel balancing, lamp replacement, photocells and wiring.

instalaciones_especiales.name: Special Installations
instalaciones_especiales.desc: Telephony, voice and data, CCTV, smoke detectors and security systems.

aire_acondicionado.name: Air Conditioning
aire_acondicionado.desc: Installation and maintenance of HVAC systems for any type of building.

carpinteria.name: Carpentry
carpinteria.desc: Manufacturing and installation of furniture, closets, kitchens and decorative wood elements.

aluminio_herreria.name: Aluminum & Ironwork
aluminio_herreria.desc: Windows, doors, aluminum framing and structural and decorative ironwork.

acabados.name: Finishes
acabados.desc: Painting, coatings, flooring, tiles and all types of quality architectural finishes.

desazolve.name: Drain Cleaning
desazolve.desc: Cleaning and maintenance of drains and storm drains to prevent flooding and damage.

urbanizacion.name: Urbanization
urbanizacion.desc: Construction of curbs, sidewalks, street lighting and urban infrastructure works.

generadores.name: Estimates & Budgets
generadores.desc: Preparation of work quantities, project estimates and detailed construction budgets.

projects.title: Projects that speak for themselves
projects.subtitle: Over 10 years of experience in institutional, commercial and infrastructure projects throughout Mexico.

values.title: The principles that set us apart
values.subtitle: Under the motto 'Together we are one', our team shares the values that guarantee excellence in every project.
values.team_subtitle: Experienced professionals with academic excellence in architecture, engineering and construction.

clients.title: Trusted by leading institutions
clients.subtitle: We have worked with top-tier government, educational and private organizations nationwide.
